titleStmt.title: SII 26.422: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 422. (A.R. No. 401 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with pūmādu puṇara puvimādu vaḷara, etc. It mentions the queen Tiribuvaṉamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records the gift of two vēli of land, after purchase, as iṟaiyili dēvadāna for worship and offerings to the image of the goddess of the holy bed-room in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar in Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Miḷāḍu in Irājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by a certain Āḷavandāḷ, daughter of Malaiyamāṉ Nānūṟṟuvaṉ Malaiyan alias Irājēṉdiraśōḻach- chēdiyarāyan of Kiḷiyūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi-Dāma-nāḍu, and wife of Malaiyamān Irāman Śūṟṟiyan alias Irājēndiraśōḻa Malaiyakularāyan of the same place. It is stated that she caused the above-mentioned image to be set up for the merit of her mother (āchchi) Uḍaiyān Sūryadēvi alias Niṟaitavañjeydāḷ. It is stated that the land was purchased by Āḷavandāḷ through Vikiramaśōḻachēdiyarāyaṉ, son of Irājavirājēndiraśōḻach-chēdiyarāyaṉ. Of the two vēli of land, one vēli in Śiṟṟiṅgūr was to be a kuḍi-nīṅgā dēvadāna and to be cultivated by the sabhai of the place who should pay the income to the god. It is stated that the donor also gave two kāśu to the sabhai in this connection.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat tantiruppatumalar maṉnavar cūṭa manniyavurimaiyāl maṇimuṭicūṭic ceṅkolceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷaṟppa veṅkalinikki meyyaṟan taḻaippakkaliṅka miriyakkaṭal malai Utaitu valaṅkoḷḷāḻivarai yāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟṟac cempon virasiṁhāsanattut tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu patinañcāvatu
Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu milāṭāṉa kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭai yār tiruppulippakavatevaṟku tirumuṉaippāṭit tāmanāṭṭukkiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ nānūṟṟuvaṉ malaiyanāṉa Irājeṉtiracoḻaccetiya rāyan makaḷ Ikkiḷiyūr malaiyamānar Irāman cūṟṟiyanāṉa Irājentiracoḻamalaiyakularāyanakamuṭai yāḷ Āḷavantāḷ taṅkaḷ Ācci Uṭaiyān cūriyateviyāṉa niṟaitavañcey tāḷukkāka Eḻuntaruḷu tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nācciyāṟku tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷi
ṭṭa nimaṉtaṅkaḷukkut tevatāṉamāka Irājavirājentiracoḻaccetiyarāyan makan yāṉa vikkiramacoḻaccetiyarāyaṉaiyiṭṭu Ivvāḷavantāḷ Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamākak koṇṭu viṭuvitta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai tiruppulippakavavatikku meṟku ppumālai taṭiyiraṇṭukku meṟkut tenpāṟkellai turavoṭu cekkum marutaṅkaḻanikkum karuppukkālukkum Aracaṅkuṇṭilukkum viḷākattukkālukkum naṭakkālukkum taṇṇāmpaṟavaikkum kuṇṭikai mukkukkuṭi Iṭai
peruceykkum kamukaṭikkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai taṇṇāmpaṟavaikku nirpāyn kkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Aiymperuṅkālukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicain=ta nāṟperellaiyil Uḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam Oru veliyum kuṭiniṅkāt tevatānamāy Icciṟṟiṅkūril sabhaiyārey Uḻutu tevaṟkukkaṭamai Iṟukka kaṭavārkaḷākavum tiruppulippakavavatikkuk kiḻakku viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai talaippāṭakattukku nirpāyn=ta kaṇṇikkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟku E
llai nārāṇataṭi Iraṇṭukkum pirappañcey teṟkil taṭikkum Aimperuṅkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai tiruppulippakavatikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai putut tiruttukkum Ūḷaikkum tirunilakaṇṭanukkum caṭaiyanārmeṭṭukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta nāṟpperellai yuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam Oru veliyum Āka nilam Iru veli Iṉnilam Iruvelikkum Ivvūr sabhaiyāṟku Iṭṭa kācu Iraṇṭu In nilam cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka ceyvittāḷ kiḷiyūr malaiyamāna Irāman cūṟṟiyanāna Irājentracoḻamalaiyaku
larājaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ Āḷavantāḷ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.422 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
